calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Trustee Of Trust And For Modification Of Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Trustee Of Trust And For Modification Of Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Continued To Oct-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Trustee Of Trust And For Modification Of Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Continued To Oct-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Colin Kelley for (petitioner) Benton Tong.

The Court stated that it is not satisfied with efforts to find the brothers, that in regards to Dennis Tong the gate is chained on the inside indicating that someone is there, that no further steps have been taken and that the trustee can gain entrance. Mr. Kelley stated that Mr. Benton Tong does not feel that he has a right to enter and that the neighbors have not seen Dennis Tong in many years. The Court stated that they can ask the police for a welfare check, reiterated that sufficient efforts have not been made and that in regards to Gregory Tong correspondence has only been sent to his P.O. Box based on a request made 30 years ago. Mr. Kelley stated that they have attempted to reach him via telephone but have been unable to reach him and that they will send mail to his physical address. The Court suggested that they hire someone to go to the house and that the court would prefer to know that everything possible has been done to get him noticed. Mr. Kelley stated that they will attempt to notice him differently and asked if personal service was necessary. The Court stated that personal service is not a requirement but it is required that they make a good faith effort. Mr. Kelley stated that the examiner has issue with venue. The Court stated that if the administration of the trust is by out of state trustees the presence of property is not enough to keep it her however vacancy of the trustee is a good argument. The petition to determine trustee of trust and for modification of trust due to changed circumstances was continued to October 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
